attributes.description: A customer operations product developed by Helio Systems.
The company that develops Aurora Portal and is located in Singapore.
The city where Helio Systems is located.
The service used by Aurora Portal for user profiles and sessions.
The worker that handles asynchronous billing messages and invoice calculations.
The console used for analytical audit queries.
The job that creates generated CSV exports.
The gateway that accepts customer requests after identity checks.
The database used by the Identity Service.
The messaging system used by the Billing Worker.
The analytics database used by the Audit Console.
The storage used by the Export Job for CSV exports.
The runtime environment where Aurora Portal is deployed.
Events produced by the Billing Worker after invoice calculations.
The governance policy for audit log retention.
Logs governed by the Data Retention Policy and used as evidence.
Reports that are evidenced by Audit Logs.
